_note: SUR-657 crypto-parity FROZEN inputs. Do not change any value — these define the byte-for-byte parity contract between the JS crypto (src/crypto/*) and the SUR-658 shared native core (Rust/UniFFI + KMM). Byte fields are hex; noteId/pin/bookId/plaintext are literal strings (UTF-8). mk is 0x11x32 on purpose: it anchors the content-tag vector to the already-reviewed known-answer in src/test/contentTag.test.js.
